analysis.summary: The technician accessed the Cisco UCS Manager web interface and navigated to the Ethernet port configuration for Fabric Interconnect B. The technician then initiated the process to configure Port 31 as an FCoE Storage Port by right-clicking and selecting the relevant option from the context menu.
actions_taken: Accessed Cisco UCS Manager via web browser (172.16.9.20)
Navigated to Fabric Interconnect B (primary) > Ethernet Ports
Right-clicked on Port 31 to open the 'LAN Uplinks Manager' context menu
Selected 'Configure as FCOE Storage Port' option

tech_performance.efficiency_notes: The technician worked methodically, directly navigating to the intended configuration area and selecting the appropriate action without hesitation.
